title: Using formulated date for automation
excerpt: Hi we have changed a date field to be calculated and now we cant use it in automations.  Any work arounds?

posts.author: amac (Amanda McClelland)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi we have changed a date field to be calculated and now we cant use it in automations. Any work arounds?

posts.author: PolishedGeek (Polished Geek | Platinum Partner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @amac - There is no way currently to use a calculated value or data in Automations. You can, however, use the General Caster app to calculate the date for you off-board, and then “cast” it back into a real date field. Then you can use Automations as normal on that field.

You can find General Caster here in the Marketplace: https://www.monday.com/marketplace/8
